Describe the sequence of visual elements shown from the beginning of the video until the woman appears near the dumbbell rack.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a teal GymVirtual logo appears on white; at 4s, a person in black performs a forward bend with white text overlay; at 8s, the person twists while stretching near a mirror; at 14s, the woman stands near a rack of colorful dumbbells and grey steps.

question: Walk through the changing background environments and text overlays visible during the first twenty seconds.
canonical_answer: At 0s, white background shows website text above a teal logo; at 4s, white text titles appear over a wooden floor studio; at 8s, mirrors reflect gym equipment behind the stretching person; at 14s, a website URL appears in the corner near colorful dumbbells and grey steps.
